name: doc-set-missing-1-no-mortgage-statement
anchor: Doc set axis: missing-1 (refi without mortgage_statement)
rationale: Refinance scenario where mortgage_statement is NOT attached. Vienna's intake_asked_items flow should detect missing required doc + ask broker to forward. F1.FB falls back to loan_app source (per A33). F2.DH should not activate (no discrepancy, just missing source).
notes: Single-event sequence. Tests intake-doc-detection flow for the canonical required-docs set.
